uplink.description: fPort 2 flow uplink, flag 2 (60 pulses/L), MOD 0, 12000 pulses -> 200 L
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; cumulative-volume expectation cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Water_flow_value = totalPulse / 60 for flag 2). Timestamp emitted as UTC RFC3339 (upstream uses non-deterministic local-TZ Date methods).

uplink.description: fPort 2 flow uplink, flag 1 (360 pulses/L), MOD 1, alarm set, 36000 pulses -> 100 L
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; volume cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Water_flow_value = totalPulse / 360 for flag 1). MOD 1 reports lastPulse rather than totalPulse, per upstream.

uplink.description: fPort 5 device-status uplink: SW3L, fw 1.4.6, EU868, battery 3.300 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status input; battery (mV/1000), model, firmware, and band decode cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js fPort 5.
